features.description: Base role-delegation capability — the OOF / handover flow. Every tenant tier gets this.
Bypass min_advance_notice_hours (default 0 — allow immediate) — reserved for tenants that need instant delegation without lead-time confirmation. Medium + enterprise.
Access to `delegations:audit-oof-usage` report + the equivalent surface in the admin UI. Enterprise-only.

Some enterprise tenant contracts require ALL impersonation of their users be read-only-only. When this feature is enabled on a tenant, the ImpersonationSessionObserver refuses any is_read_only=false session against that tenant's users. Enterprise + contract-negotiated.
Sessions longer than 60 minutes. Enterprise contract-negotiated. Individual sessions still require super_admin extension.

Enterprise hook — when a tenant declares a compliance regime (via metadata.compliance_regime), additional audit stream annotations + notification channels activate. Wave 2 open door for HIPAA / SOX customers.
